creator: sheldonh@starjuice.net
text:
On Wed, 05 Sep 2001 20:35:42 +0900, "Akinori MUSHA" wrote:

> > You're right.  How silly of me. Only exim and exim-monitor should appear
> > on the first CDROM.
> 
> It seems those ports produce packages with the same name, exim-3.33.
> Probably you should have set exim-monitor's PORTNAME to exim-monitor?

Aaaargh!!!!! *thump* *thump* *thump*

You're right.  Patch applied.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
